title: helosciadium × moorei
intro: Helosciadium × moorei, also known as English parsley, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the wild celery (Apium repens) and the marsh parsley (Apium nodiflorum). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Helosciadium × moorei include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. This plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its fresh leaves can be used in salads or as a garnish, while its roots can be used in soups and stews.
